entry.title: Re: Preço do material negativo

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA-ECC Integration with Ariba for Procure to Pay Business Process
entry.content:
Hi Hasan,

Thanks for the nice blog. Could you explain the details of Outline agreement creation in ECC/S4 from Ariba via CIG.

Thanks,

Amit

entry.title: Re: From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Approach in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Ravdeep,

this is an interesting approach and kudos to you for figuring it out and sharing it.

However I share @rammel_sapdev 's concern. It's not possible to create the event handler class in ABAP Cloud, because the R_* Business Objects are not released for ABAP Cloud development. As I understand it, they are not intended for customer use. E.g. see here:

Although technically possible, a Business Object should not be consumed directly. Instead, consumers should access Business Object Projections (BO Projections) and Business Object Interfaces (BO Interfaces)

It's the BO Interface, I_SALESORDERTP, that you initially identify - but we can't use this, because it doesn't include the events.

So sorry to say, I don't think this approach is Clean Core.

entry.title: Search Documents and ECNs that is linked to a Material using a table in SE16N
entry.content:
Hello, I would like to know how to search for Documents (DIRs) and Change Master Record (ECNs) that is linked to a Material using any table in SE16N or database.

I know the basic search transaction 'Find Documents'.

In my case, I have a huge number of MAT numbers. Using this, I need to know what all DIRs and ECNs are linked to them.

If someone could share the info, very much appreciated for your support and knowledge.

entry.title: Re: Optimizing field column widths in a Fiori Elements Li...
entry.content:
Hi,

I had the same issue and i realised that the cds annotation @UI.lineItem:[{cssDefault.width:'x%'}]  is working with OData V4 service, not with V2.

@kchatch1 what type of service are you using ?

Also, if you don't want to switch from V2 to V4, I posted a solution here (it consists of using the column width property in the Manifest).

Good luck !

entry.title: Re: Costcenter Group in CO Fiori Apps

We have a report where we are able to duplicate routings and modify the last operation.
This works fine, but the problem is that in the duplicated routing the text in task list remains the same as the copied routing.



How can I modify this text through that function?
Maybe we need to change to another function module?

Thank you very much!

Iva

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Chatbot Development Made Easy with SAP AI Core and Build Apps

entry.title: Re: MDK Binding and Control access issues
entry.content:
You can redraw the section by getting the reference to it and calling redraw.

 

let kv = context.getPageProxy().getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('KVSection');
kv.redraw();

Add the redraw after you store the result object in client data in your rule.

entry.title: Unable to reach BaDI /SAPAPO/CURTO_CREATE Method BEFORE_SAVE through CURTOADV_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are implementing ePP/DS in SAP S/4HANA Edition 2021 Sp3.

We had assembled in our routing 2 operations, each one with respective work center, same productivity, with mandatory overlapping and included it, together with respective BOM, into a Production Version of a code in PP/DS.

When we try to transform it into an ePP/DS EDP, the activities relationships remain with a soft constraint, named "Minimum Constraint" (CONSTRAINT_SUBTYPE = 0) on start-start and finish-finish relationships among them (attachment "minimun constraint.jpg"). This is default constraint in PP/DS using routings.

Our goal is to set "Minimum constraint = Maximum constraint=0" value in CONSTRAINT_SUBTYPE. (attachment  "equal constraint.jpg")

We were trying to reach it through advise of SAP Note 1873307, which set a way through BaDI /SAPAPO/CURTO_CREATE Method BEFORE_SAVE: however, when we use the tcode CURTOADV_CREATE, the only BaDI on track seems to be CUSLNTRTO_ADDIN.

Do you know a way to reach, while executing CURTOADV_CREATE, to reach BaDI /SAPAPO/CURTO_CREATE ?

SAP Support did not answer that to us.

 

Best Regards,

P.R.

entry.title: Copy Operator
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am using a copy operator within a planning area, where the source and target key figures have different planning levels. While the copy operator runs successfully, the data is not being loaded into the target key figure because the planning object is not being created. Could you please assist me in resolving this issue?

Ex:
Source Planning level: MTHPRDID ----> target Planning Level MTHPRDIDLOC
Root Attribute: PRDID                                Root Attribute: PRDID & LOCID

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Machine Learning with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
@AdrianDBorja which version of hana_ml are you using? Could you upgrade to the latest from pypi.org/hana-ml ?

Can you filter the dataframes on a single group-key and apply fit / predict without the grouping column?

Another hint, from the explanations I am not 100% sure, your predict-dataframe, does it include the target column (with empty values) or not?

Furthermore, this notebook incl. an example on how to use AdditiveModelForecast in massive-mode / group-key and as well the amf.make_future_dataframe method.

Best regards,
Christoph

I am also going through this Node.js security-based update and I would appreciate more detailed info about which Node.js version is appropriate for which PD version (and SP). Thanks in advance, Ondrej.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: On Integration Suite page, left menu items are not vi...
entry.content:
Hi!

You have to assign the appropriate user roles for the activated capabilities in the BTP first.

entry.title: SAP Workflow: Create document from template using multiline container
entry.content:
Hello!

I managed to create a simple workflow where you enter data in a form (DYNP_FORM, aka Dynpro), save the table data in a multiline container and create a Word-Document from it.

But: I did not manage to transfer all table lines to the word template.

When adding a multiline container to the template, you will be asked:

SAP-Note 1447013 says, that it is not possible to send carriage returns to the word template, what I hardly believe. Displaying structured table data like this is not perfect but might be okay:

939                TIRE SET
477                BODY (BLUE)
388                RADIO

It would be better, if I could access elements of the table directly: {&DEMO_TABLE[1].MATNR&} 

But unfortunately, this does not work. 🥴

This

Comes out like this:

Any ideas or even solutions? 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Background processing for ABAP report with selection screen
entry.content:
Should anybody stumble into the same issue at some point: I did too, while trying to run a background job for a custom report.

SM50 process monitor continuously showing SAP standard programs being called, without ever coming to a stop.

I aborted the job and jumped into the debugger to get an idea what might goes sideways. 

Within the report I used "CALL SELECTION-SCREEN" to call the screen. This appears to be a problem. 
You probably want to use:
SUBMIT (zreport) USING SELECTION-SCREEN <scr_no> USING SELECTION-SET sy-slset AND RETURN. 
sy-slset should contain the name of your variant.

I called it after START-OF-SELECTION. This (for some reason I still havent understood) ran into and endless loop. The report did what it was supposed to, but the job never ended and just repeated itself over and over.

Since it has been repeated within the same session, I just declared a global variable to mark "already been here, exit now".    

I doubt that's the way it supposed to be handled, so feel free to complement this topic with constructive criticism but at least it works.  

It's probably simpler to just use FM JOB_OPEN, SUBMIT and JOB_CLOSE to handle the Job interaction.

entry.title: Re: Automating Employee Vacation Reminders in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Hi @PetraRana, thanks for your feedback! Are you referring to the Document Generation part? I have created a Document Template (and group) with the category "Document Generation" so that an HR administrator can notify all employees at the same time via Mass Document Generation. It was important for my client to be able to send the reminder via E-Mail and have a read access log, instead of only having the document available in SF to download.

entry.title: Re: Make a field appear in FB02/FB03
entry.content: I think you need to implement this note to make those fields visible in FB01, FB02, FB03, etc. "1938404 - FI: Fields VERTT, VERTN, and VBEWA are missing on G/L account line"

entry.title: Re: "Revolutionizing SAP Implementations: How AI is Chang...
entry.content:
Hey Martin, Haha, I didn’t mean to confuse you! I actually wanted to post this as a blog. 😅

I believe SAP Commerce Accelerator is a ready-to-use web implementation template that helps jumpstart implementations and build flexible commerce solutions.
My goal was to share some thoughts on how AI can be leveraged as part of our business requirements to enhance daily operations.

In my experience, I’ve come across challenges related to documentation, gap analysis, and developing test scenarios in my SAP projects. I believe AI has the potential to streamline these areas, making S/4 transitions smoother and more efficient and help us focus more on the actual "work" 😜

While some AI-powered tools are already emerging, this is also a forward-looking perspective on how AI could further optimize implementation processes in the future.

Appreciate your thoughts, and thanks for engaging! Looking forward to more discussions 😄

entry.title: Re: C0 Developer Extensibility for CDS Data Models
entry.content:
@WRoeckelein 

Unfortunately, this warning cannot be suppressed. 

Documentation for suppressing warnings: ABAP CDS - General Syntax Rules 

So to find a suitable comment, you have to check the long text warning message. For this message, the message text says:

No comment available in this case.

entry.title: Re: ERROR: Invalid filename. Please enter a valid file name.
entry.content:
I have since resolved the issue and am posting my own answer to help others that might have the same issue in the future.

It was actually an easy fix.

When saving the file name it did not have a .vbs file extension. After having a work college test out his macro recording, I noticed that his auto populated with the .vbs file extension. I tried that on mine, and it worked.

Issue: 

  • Invalid filename. Please enter a valid file name.

Resolution:

  • Add .vbs to file name.

entry.title: Re: Distribution of amount in AUC Settlement rule
entry.content: Thanks for reply . But actually it was related to settlment profile configuration issue .In settlment profile. configuration Amount based column was not checked in settlment profile config . I changed it in OkO7 and problem solved

entry.title: Re: Distribution of amount in AUC Settlement rule
entry.content: Actually it was related to settlment profile configuration issue .In settlment profile. configuration Amount based column was not checked in settlment profile config . I changed it in OkO7 and problem solved

entry.title: Use P&L Account as VAT GL Account item
entry.content:
Dear SAP masters,

I have a requirement that consists to create an VAT Code non deductive for Input tax, that when used in postings, the tax account used in the tax item should be the same of the account of the item of base amount (P&L account for instance) with an specific controlling object, as profit center or wbs.

Can you tell if you know any standard solution/configuration that allow this behavior in an tax code? What i have found was to do some kind of a substitution to change the tax account before posting the document.

Thank you,

Best regards,

André

ERPsim APJ Cup - Apr 11 (qualified teams only)

ERPsim LAC Competition - May 16
https://eventbrite.ca/e/1089876342479 

ERPsim EMEA Competition - May 23
https://eventbrite.ca/e/1089879883069

ERPsim International Competition - Jun 5 (qualified teams only)

how can i connect VBKPF/VBSEGK and VBAK / VBAP  TABLES.

entry.title: BI IP - use of referenced InfoObjects in aggregation level
entry.content:
Dear all,

in a aDSO (planning mode) I use 2 InfoObjects:

0CUST_SALES and ZCUST_SAL

ZCUST_SAL uses 0CUST_SALES as referenced characteristic.

Now I face several problems, e.g. when both InfoObjects are on the same aggregation Level. I have a planning filter using a navi-attribute from ZCUST_SAL and when I run a FOX Formula based on this filter it  doesn't find any data.

Characteristic Relationships of Type Exit do not work, if I use 0CUST_SALES as target.

It looks like planning system has a problem when you use an InfoObject with another "referenced" one in the same planning area.

Has someone faced a similiar problem?

A workaround could be to create an InfoObject without reference, but maybe there are other ideas.

BR

Gunter

entry.title: CAT2 is showing error message
entry.content:
Hello PS Experts, 

I'm having an issue in CAT2 tcode, Error message KL001.

But when I'm checking KP26 I have already an entry for the cost center and the activity type.

What can be a possible root cause for that issue. Thanks for advance.

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
With SAP Ariba 2502 (Feb 2025) Release, Generally Available from Fri, Feb 14, we have these 2 new Features for Invoices:

E-Invoicing of Pre-Approved Invoices for Malaysia [NG-6276]
The Malaysian tax authority has introduced new regulations to improve the e-invoicing process for e-commerce transactions. To harmonize with the local regulations, SAP Business Network implements the changes in the application in two phases.
In this release, suppliers can recreate a pre-approved invoice in SAP Business Network. A pre-approved invoice is an invoice created outside of SAP Business Network and approved by the Malaysian tax authority. Therefore, additional Malaysian-specific fields are introduced during invoice creation process. 

  • 2502 Readiness Feature Preview: E-Invoicing of Pre-Approved Invoices for Malaysia (NG-6276)

Enhancements to Outbound Invoicing Process for Malaysia [NG-6842]
This feature enhances the existing Malaysian e-invoicing process for outbound invoices (invoices created by a supplier using SAP Business Network). The invoices generated on SAP Business Network will be validated with the Inland Revenue Board of Malaysia (IRBM) portal. As a result, buyers will be able to receive both the Malaysian UBL invoice and the PDF version of the invoice.

  •  Enhancements to Outbound Invoicing Process for Malaysia

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba
entry.content:
With SAP Ariba 2502 (Feb 2025) Release, Generally Available from Fri, Feb 14, we have these 7 new Features for SAP Ariba Category Management:

  1. Enhancements to the Manage Taxonomy and Manage Configurations Apps [ARBCATA-255]
  2. Ability to Add Primary and Secondary Value Levers to Initiatives [ARBCATA-444]
  3. Ability to Use Supplier Preferencing [CATMAN-265]
  4. Ability to Manage Time Period for Spend Data [CATMAN-425]
  5. AI-Assisted Category Strategy Recommendation [CATMAN-467]
  6. User Interface Enhancements [CATMAN-423]
  7. Operational Reporting API [CATMAN-468]

For more details on these, kindly refer this link.

entry.title: Re: How to use a single position for multiple employees?
entry.content:
Hi @aradhanamokara 

You have to mark the multipleIncumbentsAllowed flag as "yes" then you will be able to assign two employees on same position (after setting the FTE =2)

Thanks

Manish

entry.title: Re: PowerDesigner NODE.JS update
entry.content: Hello Ondrej, I do not have the node.js history information. To determine the node.js version required by your PD copy, simply execute "node -v" in the DOS prompt.

entry.title: Re: Executing OData over BW Query pass back an error 400...
entry.content:
Please use below format 

Variable=datetime'YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00'

Here format should be maintained whether optional or mandatory in order for URL to work.

entry.content: Good information, thank you

entry.title: SAP Companion Announcements & Context Data
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

I have two questions regarding the authoring in the SAP Companion.

 

1. In the SAP Companion for desktop we had the opportunity to change the recorded context afterwards. Is it possible to change it for Guided tours oder help tiles in the "new" Companion?

 

2. I wanted to create an announcement in the "Whats New" section, but I was not able to find the option or I was looking at the wrong point. 

I created a Help tile and filled in a link to a guided tour, which should be started directly. I thought that there should be the announcement field below?

 

Thank you in advance!

Marie

entry.title: Automatic picking quantity without the picking be confirmed.
entry.content:
Dear Expert, How can I got the delivery quantity to be copied to picked quantity, but leave the picking status as A, not yet, to have user manually proceed to confirmation. I tried to set up the EK00, with pick confirmation set as A, each time when I create delivery, the quantity will be copied successfully, but the status comes to C automatically. The scenario I want to achieve is got picked quantity, without status be changed to C automatically. we are not using WM.

Thanks a lot.

Mia

entry.title: Connection of MDO to SAP SAC

I have a doubt about connecting SAP SAC to SAP DM MDO.

I tried with the ODATA services but getting an error. Maybe Im trying tinput some wrong entries to it. 
Please let me know if anyone has tried this out. Thank you in advance. 

KR,
Say

entry.title: Re: Issues with Recording Simulations in Microsoft Edge –...
entry.content: This states the issue is with MSEdge: Version 133.0.3065.69 (Official build) (64-bit). I have Version 133.0.3065.82 (Official build) (64-bit). SAP support responded to me they fixed the issue but I am still having this issue.

entry.title: Re: Connection of MDO to SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
I could solve the issue. You can use the public api endpoint and the following format t connect to DM MDO.

https://public-api-endpoint.cloud.sap/dmci/v2/extractor/$metadata

KR,
Sayuj

entry.title: Re: Change Material in Sales Order Line Item Using BAPI_S...
entry.content:
When You are using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE You need to fulfil table order_item_in and then change value and mark this change (X for field which You are changing) and update flag in table order_item_inx. Also You need to set update flag in the header.

 

Example code of changing rejection reason (in Your case You need to do analogic changes for MATNR

ORDER_HEADER_INX-UPDATEFLAG = "U"

ORDER_ITEM_IN- ITM_NUMBER = "000010".

ORDER_ITEM_IN-MATERIAL = material_number

ORDER_ITEM_INX-ITM_NUMBER = "000010"..

ORDER_ITEM_INX-UPDATEFLAG = "U".

ORDER_ITEM_INX-MATERIAL = "X".)

SELECT * FROM vbap INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_vbap_delv)
        WHERE vbeln = '100000002'
        AND abgru = ''
        AND uepos = '000000'
        AND ( LFGSA = 'A' OR LFGSA = 'B' ). 

 

         LOOP AT lt_vbap_delv INTO DATA(ls_vbap_delv).

          APPEND INITIAL LINE TO order_item_in ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<it_in_dlv>).
          <it_in_dlv>-itm_number = ls_vbap_delv-posnr.
          <it_in_dlv>-reason_rej  = 'Z1'.

          APPEND INITIAL LINE TO order_item_inx ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<it_in_dlvx>).
          <it_in_dlvx>-itm_number =  <it_in_dlv>-itm_number.
          <it_in_dlvx>-reason_rej = 'X'.
          <it_in_dlvx>-updateflag = 'U'.

        ENDLOOP.

order_header_inx-updateflag = 'U'.

          CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE'
            EXPORTING
              salesdocument    = '100000002'
              order_header_inx = order_header_inx
            TABLES
              return           = return
              order_item_in    = order_item_in
              order_item_inx   = order_item_inx.

          CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
            EXPORTING
              WAIT          = 'X'

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Delivery tab Address Change
entry.content: To delete

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Delivery tab Address Change
entry.content:
You can try use BADI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM or BD_MMPUR_FINAL_CHECK_PO in enhancement spot ES_MMPUR_PROCESS_PO_CLOUD.

You can change field for address – ADRNR_MM or ADRNR.

You can always try to find convenient BADI / API using Business Accelerator Hub

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPS4HANACloud/overview

entry.title: The time event has not been paired as there is no corresponding time event to pair with.
entry.content:
Good afternoon, I have a client who has clock out followed by clock in, and the system gives the error "The time event has not been paired as there is no corresponding time event to pair with." Any tips?

Thansk

entry.title: Re: Billing Document Not Released on Time – Background Job Issue
entry.content: Edit and clarification: Typically, once a sales order is released the billing and invoice document is created overnight through a background job but at this time there is delay (Sales order: 2023.11.29 & invoice 2023.12.04)

entry.title: Re: Enhance VD52, Customer material Info Records.
entry.content:
You can add append to structure SDCUSMAT_INCL_EEW_PS

Next You can change screen 0300 from program SAPMV10A to add those new fields. Remember that this is change on standard SAP object.

entry.title: Re: Billing Document Not Released on Time – Background Jo...
entry.content: Edit and clarification: Typically, once a sales order is released the billing document is created overnight through a background job but at this time there is delay; I am searching for the reason behind that (Sales order: 2023.11.29 & billing 2023.12.04)

entry.title: please remove
entry.content: please remove

entry.title: Signavio process manager - Translation of the dictionnary
entry.content:
Dear community, 

 

I am reaching out to you because I am currently trying to translate some of my BPMNs in SAP Process manager and I am facing an issue. 

I am following this help guide : Traduire les diagrammes | SAP Help Portal

And I realized that if I follow it-up my translation is indeed appearing on the BPMN on the attributes listed on the right handside but not at all on the Dictionnary. Therefore I tried to make the translation of dictionnary related items directly in Dictionnary but when I do so my modification is not saved (when I come back in the dictionnary item after saving, the translation is gone). 

 

Have you ever encountered this issue ? How to you proceed to translate your BPMNs and dictionnary items in process manager ? 

 

Thank you

SAnddie

entry.title: Re: SAP EBS: Question on Interpretation Algorithm "20 020: Document Number Search"
entry.content:
Hi Vassili,

in general, the clearing is also possible between 2 different accounts.
I cannot judge why it worked in the one system but not in the other without some more information.
Are you on public cloud or on private cloud?

 

Best Regards, Joerg

entry.title: Re: Workforce integration from Master Data Integration service to SAP S/4HANA Cloud – Part2
entry.content:
Hello dear @TiagoRibeiro 

We have been following this documentation closesly and are happy to successfull orchestrate workforce persons between s/4 and Successfactor. 

For little debug purposes id like to read the workforce person directly from the MDI via Postman. In my Case im not using Postman, i use insomnia. 

So i use uri value of service key + /v0/odm/3.0.0/log/sap.odm.workforce.WorkforcePerson as URL and client id and client secret as credentials. But i dont know how to get the right token. 

therefore i dont get a good response from the endpoint. 

 

p.s. im very new and dont know how to use BTP apis >.<

 

kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: Re: Fiori: add new field on standard tab or custom new tab
entry.content: @a_montesdeoca I have take a look for App extensibility. very helpful. when I switch to Adaptable mode with Fiori Launchpad App manager. how to position the app Manage purchase contract and see UI elelment. Pls advise a little more. just would like to explore.

entry.title: Re: User Managment IAS/Azure
entry.content:
Hello @yogananda 

 

thanks for your reply!

We do it the same way: defining groups in Azure (e.g., sac_admins), provisioning them to IAS, and filtering them to cloud apps like SAC.

There are three options to manage users in Azure:

  1. Remove the user from the sac_admins group (but don’t delete them from Azure). The IPS job will then remove this user from SAC and deleting their content.
  2. Deactivate or delete the user in Azure - that removes access for this user to all cloud apps in Azure
  3. Deactivate the user in IAS, but they will be overwritten by the next IPS job.

What’s the best way to delete a user in cloud apps via IPS while avoiding automatic content deletion (e.g SAC)  and ensuring the user can still access other apps in Azure?

Many Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: SPOT Thank you Award - The certificate is not loading in the employee/manager profile
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are experiencing the same issue. We have configured the certificate following the same KBA and have verified all the permissions as outlined in the "Reward & Recognition - Tips and Tricks."

@AndresCarter Could you kindly provide further guidance in resolving this issue?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Top 10 SAP Cloud ALM News February 2025
entry.content:
Hi and thx for yet another month with useful CALM-updates.

But, for points 2 and 7, it would have been great if these features would not only be usable for Solman-transition-related content added into CALM (what I got informed about in a customer case communication), but also for manual use by "greenfield"-CALM users.

I guess this will come at some point, and for point 2 maybe soon in an update of the Signavio integration with enlarged scope (??), but I think for clarity, the "What's new"-info could have pointed that out and maybe you want to update the texts in the blog above as well!?!?

Keep up the good work 🙂 - Ingo

entry.title: Re: Using Shift Note and Shift Reports features in SAP PP & PM: Streamlining Communication and Repor
entry.content: Excellent explanation!

entry.title: Re: Script to extract measure values and loop through the...
entry.content: Hi @GiriRaaj, Thank you!. Can I use the script as is by just changing the relevant widget names & logic to those from my story/use case?. Is this the only way to use Alerts in SAC?, if so when is the alert triggered - on running the story?

entry.title: Re: Error while creating ABAP Cloud Project in Eclipse - Credentials / Login data
entry.content: I am trying to log in to TRL_EN system from Eclipse and I have the correct service URL; it asks me for the username and password; I tried entering the correct username and password; it keeps asking the credentials despite entering the correct username and password

entry.title: trying to understand a concept 'Extend'
entry.content:
why and when do we need to extend "Supplier to Purchase Org " ? To accomplish …?

Or whenever we "Extend to" something do we try to accomplish something specific ?

I am in pains to understand the 'extend' concept and need all the direction I can get to understand it. 

 

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: HCM rule
entry.content:
Hello, I am trying to create new professional groups, but when validating this rule I cannot find the meaning of:
                  NUM=D GRPR

I don't know what table D is or if is another value.

Thanks,

entry.title: SAM2410 : Code 500 at init/sync as soon as a CIM extension is added to the standard app
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm upgrading from SAM2305 to SAM2410.

Metadata : SAM2410 + OSS note 3543925  - App version 2410.0.2 - MDK : 24-7-6-001

The standard application works perfectly well now and I began to add a few specifics using CIM and extension .

Very simple customization : Only change the Display Name of the app in Global/Passport and change some translation i18n files. Nothing dangerous.

Since I deployed the "CIM application" , I have issues with a 500 error code, in the client, at initialization or at Synchronization.

Nothing shows in a /IWFND/TRACES. No warning/error in the BTP logs.

I'm working with Business Application Studio and the deployment of the "CIM app" is OK (Bundle OK, update of the app in Mobile Services).

App is tested on iOS devices.

Any help ? any ideas ?

I have a clientlog but it's too big a file to post it

entry.title: FIori: Adaptive Mode how to
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

According to the help doc that I can switch to adaptive mode at runtime.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4fc8d03390c342da8a60f8ee387bca1a/5c424437bf794f809087fdce391149f2.html

How to set my user profile to have Adaptive mode option?

Pls advise.

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP BTP Trial account with Eclipse
entry.content:
I am trying to connect my BTP trial account with Eclipse and it keeps bringing up the credentials popup.

I entered the correct username and password but the sign in prompt keeps coming back on.

Can someone please help?

entry.title: Re: Upload Document Reference Information via DTW
entry.content:
Yes, it is possible. you should use RDR21 template.

I am attaching the template.

DTW Template Fields Explained:

🔹 ParentKey (DocNum): The document number where you want to add the referenced document. (Example: 91490549)

🔹 DocEntry: The DocEntry of the ParentKey document (Example: DocEntry of 91490549)

🔹 RefDocEnt: The DocEntry of the document you want to reference.

🔹 RefObjType: The Object Type (ObjType) of the document you want to reference.

With this setup, DTW will correctly link the referenced document to your target document.

entry.title: Re: Background Data is updated in Candidate Profile but n...
entry.content: Hi @Rohit- can you please check your inbox? i sent you a message privately. Thanks.

entry.title: PU19 Error in Generating PDF
entry.content:
Hello, 

what could be the possible cause of these errors? I already checked the ADS and it its working fine, the forms are also maintained in V_T5UX7

Note: It is working in Prod system but not working in Lower Environments

entry.title: Re: Upload Document Reference Information via DTW RDR21
entry.content:
Hello

The error is because you don't have all the required data in the template.

DTW Template Fields Explained:

🔹 ParentKey (DocNum): The document number where you want to add the referenced document. (Example: 91490549)

🔹 DocEntry: The DocEntry of the ParentKey document (Example: DocEntry of 91490549)

🔹 RefDocEnt: The DocEntry of the document you want to reference.

🔹 RefObjType: The Object Type (ObjType) of the document you want to reference.

With this setup, DTW will correctly link the referenced document to your target document.

entry.title: Re: How Data driven Change Management with Deep Transformation Insights ensures successful SAP Busin
entry.content:
Quite nice article, but where do I get more detailed information on DTI framework?
The link to SAP Change Management only provides a general information pdf document.

Best 
Goetz

entry.title: Re: Exception in Custom logic CX_BLE_RUNTIME_ERROR with a...
entry.content:
" Option 1)
MESSAGE e002(fins_rev_rec) WITH 'IFRS' 'RA1' INTO FINAL(lv_msg) .
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_ble_runtime_error USING MESSAGE.

" Option 2)
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_ble_runtime_error MESSAGE e002(fins_rev_rec) WITH 'IFRS' 'RA1'.

" Option 3) ... error without message class - the pure error text
FINAL(lo_exception) = NEW cx_ble_runtime_error( error_message = 'This is error' ).
RAISE EXCEPTION lo_exception.

 

" Option 4) if you need more parameters then add: attr3 = 'param3' attr4 = 'param4' and then poplulate them with values. The Maximum is 4 parameters.

FINAL(lo_exception2) = NEW cx_ble_runtime_error( textid = value #( msgid = 'FINS_REV_REC' msgno = '002' attr1 = 'param1' attr2 = 'param2' ) param1 = 'IFRS' param2 = 'RA1' ).
RAISE EXCEPTION lo_exception2.

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP JSON to ABAP Structure
entry.content:
It depends how you defined LR_DATA.

Note that /UI2/CL_JSON is documented here: SAP/abap-to-json: ABAP to JSON serializer and deserializer

Here's your JSON, correctly formatted so that anybody can look at your question.

 

{
    "detail": [
        {
            "type": "success",
            "data": [
                {
                    "id": "bb3dbe1c-def5-45ff-beec-bcfbc6bce751",
                    "job_id": "45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a",
                    "status": "Completed",
                    "name": "MY_Use Case 1_Insurance_Motor Quotation.pdf",
                    "type": "application/pdf",
                    "result": {
                        "line": "Allianz General Insurance Company (Malaysia) Berhad (200601015674) Quotation No : QKL24100001965 Authorised Agent TBB ENTERPRISE SDN. BHD. Issued Date : 02-10-2024 NO. 329, 1ST FLOOR, JALAN PUDU 55100 KUALA LUMPUR Contact: 92228855 Fax No: 92225491 E-Mail: general@tbb.com.my Motor Quotation Quotation To LIAU CHIEW HAR Client Gender FEMALE Client NRIC / Busn. Reg 76102512xxxx Client Marital Status MARRIED Client Postcode 47100 Client City PUCHONG Client State SELANGOR Client HP / Phone No 60123495159 Client Email ALICE_LIAU@YAHOO.CO.UK Vehicle No. VDU1215 Agent Code KL32922 Cover Note Type NEW BUSINESS - OLD VEHICLE, OLD REGISTRATION Vehicle Class PRIVATE CARS EXCLUDING GOODS Vehicle Use PRIVATE CAR -PRIVATE USE (DRIVE TO WORK/DAILY USE) Type of Cover COMPREHENSIVE Inception Date 05-10-2024 Expiry Date 04-10-2025 Make & Model HONDA CR-V 1.5L TC-P 2WD Capacity 1498.00 CC No. of Seats 5 Year of Manufacturing 2019 Sum Insured RM 117,000.00 Agreed Value) (HONDA CR-V RW WAGON TC-P 2WD (A) 1.5 [4DOOR 1 SPEED CONSTANTLY VARIABLE] CKD-HIGH) NCD 55.00 % Basic Premium (Vehicle) 3,143.24 Basic Premium (Trailer) + 0.00 3,143.24 NCD 55.00 - 1,728.78 ADD BENEFIT SUM INSURED UNNAMED DRIVER RM 0.00 20.00 LEGAL LIABILITY OF PASSENGERS FOR NEGLIGENT ACTS RM 0.00 7.50 COVER FOR WINDSCREENS, WINDOWS AND SUNROOF RM 2,000.00 300.00 INCLUSION OF SPECIAL PERILS RM 117,000.00 234.00 KEY CARE RM 1,000.00 7.00 CAR BREAK-IN/ROBBERY RM 500.00 3.00 MOTOR ENHANCED ROAD WARRIOR (PLAN A) RM 10,000.00 99.00 LEGAL LIABILITY TO PASSENGERS RM 0.00 33.75 Gross Premium 2,118.71 + Stamp Duty + 10.00 Total Insurance Premium 2,128.71 0.00 Road Tax 0.00 Other Amount 0.00 Service Tax + 169.50 Total Payable 2298.21 Amount Payable (Rounded) 2298.20 Risk Excess 0.00 Page 1 02-10-2024 11:56:27 ",

                            "NCD": "55.00 %",
                            "Cover Note Type": "NEW BUSINESS - OLD VEHICLE, OLD REGISTRATION",
                            "Client HP / Phone No": "60123495159",
                            "Type of Cover": "COMPREHENSIVE",
                            "Agent Code": "KL32922",

                            "Vehicle No.": "VDU1215",
                            "Issued Date :": "02-10-2024",
                            "Contact:": "92228855",
                            "E-Mail:": "general@tbb.com.my",
                            "Year of Manufacturing": "2019",
                            "Client Gender": "FEMALE",
                            "Vehicle Class": "PRIVATE CARS EXCLUDING GOODS",
                            "Client Postcode": "47100",
                            "Client City": "PUCHONG",
                            "Client NRIC / Busn. Reg": "76102512xxxx",
                            "Client Marital Status": "MARRIED",
                            "Client Email": "ALICE_LIAU@YAHOO.CO.UK",
                            "Make & Model": "HONDA CR-V 1.5L TC-P 2WD",
                            "Capacity": "1498.00 CC",
                            "Quotation No :": "QKL24100001965",
                            "Amount Payable (Rounded)": "2298.20",
                            "Page": "1",
                            "Quotation To": "LIAU CHIEW HAR",
                            "Client State": "SELANGOR",
                            "Expiry Date": "04-10-2025",
                            "Sum Insured": "RM 117,000.00 Agreed Value) (HONDA CR-V RW WAGON TC-P 2WD (A) 1.5 [4DOOR 1 SPEED CONSTANTLY VARIABLE] CKD-HIGH)",
                            "No. of Seats": "5",
                            "Basic Premium (Trailer) +": "0.00 3,143.24",
                            "Inception Date": "05-10-2024",
                            "Road Tax": "0.00",
                            "Risk Excess": "0.00",
                            "+ Stamp Duty": "10.00",
                            "55.00 -": "1,728.78",
                            "Basic Premium (Vehicle)": "3,143.24",

                            "COVER FOR WINDSCREENS, WINDOWS AND SUNROOF RM 2,000.00": "300.00",

                            "UNNAMED DRIVER RM 0.00": "20.00",
                            "MOTOR ENHANCED ROAD WARRIOR (PLAN A) RM 10,000.00": "99.00"
                        },
                        "table": [
                            {
                                "heading": [
                                    ""
                                ],
                                "rows": [
                                    ""
                                ]
                            }
                        ],
                        "signature": [],
                        "barcode": []
                    },
                    "document_id": "ccb4835aee3ebc0a21e1055eb341a9f6",
                    "page_number": 1,
                    "document_url": "https://bsl-idp.s3.amazonaws.com/45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a/extract/tmp/0_45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a_convert_page_to_image_7210ef34-edec-4db3-8f5d-d70431a01cef.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Credential=AKIA5MOD6YSH6SB7LSYY%2F20250227%2Fap-south-1%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20250227T061203Z&X-Amz-Expires=604800&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&X-Amz-Signature=175525131e052ba6bcac9af50487729f83710edadb3a17cfad8d5933c8bfa035",

                    "pages": 2,
                    "created_at": "2025-02-12T10:53:37.820070+05:30",

                },
                {
                    "id": "509e28db-6794-4e02-91d3-e35f4c7310e9",
                    "job_id": "45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a",
                    "status": "Completed",
                    "name": "MY_Use Case 1_Insurance_Motor Quotation.pdf",
                    "type": "application/pdf",
                    "result": {
                        "line": "Allianz General Insurance Company (Malaysia) Berhad (200601015674) Quotation No : QKL24100001965 Authorised Agent TBB ENTERPRISE SDN. BHD. Issued Date : 02-10-2024 NO. 329, 1ST FLOOR, JALAN PUDU 55100 KUALA LUMPUR Contact: 92228855 Fax No: 92225491 E-Mail: general@tbb.com.my Voluntary Excess 0.00 Excess is the first amount that you are required to pay towards a claim you make on your car. Voluntary excess is the amount of excess you may opt in return of lower basic premium. Risk excess is the amount of excess determined by the company based on your risk criteria. Disclaimer: This quotation is valid until 01/12/2024 subject to the details provided to generate this quotation are accurate. Our Company's acceptance of your offer based on a valid quotation is subject to our Company's Underwriting Guidelines Kindly notify us immediately if any of the details given in this quotation is inaccurate. Please note that any misrepresentation may result in avoidance of your contract of insurance, refusal or reduction of your claim, change of terms or termination of your contract of insurance in accordance with Schedule 9 of the Financial Services Act 2013. Any policy issuance, entitlement or claims submitted arising from the insurance contract issued shall be subjected to the requirements of Economic Sanctions, Terrorism Financing, Proliferation Financing and other UN-sanction Regimes. The sum insured of your vehicle at the time you purchased / renewed this policy as well as the market value at the time of the loss is determined by the motor vehicle market valuation system (SNK Market Data Research Sdn Bhd) approved by Persatuan Insurans Am Malaysia (PIAM). You should insure your vehicle at our agreed value or its current market value to avoid under-insurance or over- insurance. For more information on the effect of under-insurance and over-insurance, please refer to our policy wording or Allianz authorised agent. Page 2 02-10-2024 11:56:27 ",

entry.title: SAP CI APIM: Extracting Variables from XML and JSON Data
entry.content:
In this blog, we’ll explore how to extract variables from XML and JSON data using the Extract Variable policy in SAP API Management (APIM). This policy allows you to parse data from requests or responses and assign values to variables for use during API proxy execution.

Extracting Variables from XML Data:

Step 1: Create a Proxy

  1. Open the Proxy and navigate to the Policy section.

 

2. Click Edit in the top-right corner.

3. On the left panel, select either the Proxy Endpoint or Target Endpoint where you want to add this policy.

Step 2: Configure the Extract Variable Policy

In this scenario, we select Proxy Endpoint and attach the Extract Variable policy by clicking “+” on the right side.

Give the policy name and select the stream as Incoming or Outgoing depending on whether it should be applied to the request or response. Here, we use Incoming Request.

A sample code snippet will be generated upon adding the policy.

 

Extract Variable Policy for XML:

 

 

<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<XMLPayload>
		<Variable name="idoc_no" type="string">
			<XPath>/orders/order/header/idoc_no</XPath>
		</Variable>
		<Variable name="order_no" type="string">
			<XPath>//order_no</XPath>
		</Variable>
		<Variable name="item" type="nodeset">
			<XPath>//item</XPath>
		</Variable>
	</XMLPayload>
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
</ExtractVariables>

 

 

 

With the above policy I am extracting the below details.

  • idoc_no: Extracted using the string type to read the exact value inside idoc_no.
  • order_no: Extracted using the string type to capture the exact value inside order_no.
  • item: Extracted using the type as “nodeset” to capture the entire item node along with all its child elements. including line items and their attributes, are read and passed as a complete structure.

Refer to the SAP Documentation: SAP APIM Documentation. to modify the policy as per your requirement.

Step 3: Assign Message Policy

After extracting variables, use the Assign Message policy to store and retrieve values. you can use any other policy as per your requirement.

 

Sample Assign Message Policy for XML:

 

 

<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<Set>
		<Payload contentType="application/xml" variablePrefix="@" variableSuffix="#">
			<Orders>
				<idoc_no>@idoc_no#</idoc_no>
				<order_no>@order_no#</order_no>
				@item#
			</Orders>
		</Payload>
	</Set>
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
	<AssignTo createNew="false" type="request"> request</AssignTo>
</AssignMessage>

 

 

 

We must specify the type as either "request" or "response" depending on where the policy is applied. Since the policy is being used on the Request here, the type is set as "request".

 

 

<AssignTo createNew="false" type="request"> request</AssignTo>

 

 

 

Step 4: Testing the XML Extraction

  1. Deploy the API Proxy.

  2. Copy the API Proxy URL and test it using Postman.

  1. Pass the Content-Type as application/xml (mandatory) in the Headers.

  2. Use the sample XML payload to validate the extraction.

Below is the sample Input Payload:

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<orders>
	<order>
		<header>
			<idoc_no>888888</idoc_no>
			<order_no>5000123456</order_no>
			<sold_to>AAAA-111</sold_to>
			<ship_to>BBBB-222</ship_to>
			<order_date>20211201</order_date>
		</header>
		<item>
			<line_item>00001</line_item>
			<material>800111</material>
			<quantity_uom>pce</quantity_uom>
			<weight>20.2</weight>
			<weight_uom>kgm</weight_uom>
			<schedule>
				<line>
					<schedule_qty>10</schedule_qty>
					<schedule_date>20211210</schedule_date>
				</line>
			</schedule>
		</item>
		<item>
			<line_item>00002</line_item>
			<material>800222</material>
			<quantity_uom>pce</quantity_uom>
			<weight>200.3</weight>
			<weight_uom>kgm</weight_uom>
			<schedule>
				<line>
					<schedule_qty>40</schedule_qty>
					<schedule_date>20211210</schedule_date>
				</line>
				<line>
					<schedule_qty>60</schedule_qty>
					<schedule_date>20211220</schedule_date>
				</line>
			</schedule>
		</item>
	</order>
</orders>

 

 

Output Payload Received:

<Orders>
    <idoc_no>888888</idoc_no>
    <order_no>5000123456</order_no>
    <item>
        <line_item>00001</line_item>
        <material>800111</material>
        <quantity_uom>pce</quantity_uom>
        <weight>20.2</weight>
        <weight_uom>kgm</weight_uom>
        <schedule>
            <line>
                <schedule_qty>10</schedule_qty>
                <schedule_date>20211210</schedule_date>
            </line>
        </schedule>
    </item>
    <item>
        <line_item>00002</line_item>
        <material>800222</material>
        <quantity_uom>pce</quantity_uom>
        <weight>200.3</weight>
        <weight_uom>kgm</weight_uom>
        <schedule>
            <line>
                <schedule_qty>40</schedule_qty>
                <schedule_date>20211210</schedule_date>
            </line>
            <line>
                <schedule_qty>60</schedule_qty>
                <schedule_date>20211220</schedule_date>
            </line>
        </schedule>
    </item>
</Orders>

 

Extracting Variables from JSON Data

Step 1: Configure the Extract Variable Policy for JSON

In the same way we can extract variables from the JSON data as well to extract the JSON use the below format in the policy.

 

 

 

<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
    <JSONPayload>
		<Variable name="idoc_no">
		    <JSONPath>$.orders[0].header.idoc_no</JSONPath>
		</Variable>
		<Variable name="order_no">
		    <JSONPath>$.orders[0].header.order_no</JSONPath>
		</Variable>
		<Variable name="item">
		    <JSONPath>$.orders[*].item</JSONPath>
		</Variable>
	</JSONPayload>
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
</ExtractVariables>

 

 

 

Step 2: Assign Message Policy for JSON

 

 

 

 

<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<Set>
		<Payload contentType="application/json" variablePrefix="@" variableSuffix="#">
		    {
				"orders": [
					{
						"header": {
							"idoc_no": "@idoc_no#",
							"order_no": "@order_no#",
							}
						"item": @item#
			
					}
				]
			}
		</Payload>
	</Set>
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
	<AssignTo createNew="false" type="request">request</AssignTo>
</AssignMessage>

 

 

Step 3: Testing the JSON Extraction

  1. Deploy the API Proxy.

  2. Copy the API Proxy URL and test it using Postman.

  3. Pass the Content-Type as application/json (mandatory).

 

JSON Input payload Used:

 

 

 

{
    "orders": [
        {
            "header": {
                "idoc_no": "888888",
                "order_no": "5000123456",
                "sold_to": "AAAA-111",
                "ship_to": "BBBB-222",
                "order_date": "20211201"
            },
            "item": [
                {
                    "line_item": "00001",
                    "material": "800111",
                    "quantity_uom": "pce",
                    "weight": 20.2,
                    "weight_uom": "kgm",
                    "schedule": [
                        {
                            "schedule_qty": 10,
                            "schedule_date": "20211210"
                        }
                    ]
                },
                {
                    "line_item": "00002",
                    "material": "800222",
                    "quantity_uom": "pce",
                    "weight": 200.3,
                    "weight_uom": "kgm",
                    "schedule": [
                        {
                            "schedule_qty": 40,
                            "schedule_date": "20211210"
                        },
                        {
                            "schedule_qty": 60,
                            "schedule_date": "20211220"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

 

 

 

JSON Output:

 

 

 

{
    "orders": [
        {
            "header": {
                "idoc_no": "888888",
                "order_no": "5000123456",
            }
						"item": [
                {
                    "line_item": "00001",
                    "material": "800111",
                    "quantity_uom": "pce",
                    "weight": 20.2,
                    "weight_uom": "kgm",
                    "schedule": [
                        {
                            "schedule_qty": 10,
                            "schedule_date": "20211210"
                        }
                    ]
                },
                {
                    "line_item": "00002",
                    "material": "800222",
                    "quantity_uom": "pce",
                    "weight": 200.3,
                    "weight_uom": "kgm",
                    "schedule": [
                        {
                            "schedule_qty": 40,
                            "schedule_date": "20211210"
                        },
                        {
                            "schedule_qty": 60,
                            "schedule_date": "20211220"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

 

 

 

Conclusion

By following this approach, you can extract elements from both XML and JSON data using the Extract Variable Policy and assign them using the Assign Message Policy in SAP API Management.

For further reference:

  • SAP APIM Documentation: SAP APIM

  • Google Apigee: Apigee Docs

I hope this guide was helpful. Feel free to leave any feedback or questions in the comments. Happy learning!

entry.title: Enhancing Efficiency with Snowflake Adapter for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Challenges with SAP’s Native Snowflake Adapter for SAP Integration Suite

While SAP Integration Suite provides a framework for integration, its native Snowflake adapter presents several challenges that can complicate data workflows. Users may encounter limited authentication options, requiring manual credential management, which poses security risks. Query management is cumbersome, with no intuitive interface for browsing database structures or generating SQL queries automatically. Additionally, data ingestion is restricted by batch size limitations, affecting performance when handling large datasets. Query execution is limited to receiver-side operations, leading to inefficiencies when processing high-volume data. Lastly, the lack of real-time Change Data Capture (CDC) makes it difficult to maintain synchronized data across SAP and Snowflake environments.

Seamless Authentication with OAuth 2.0

Advantco’s Snowflake adapter simplifies authentication with full support for OAuth 2.0, ensuring secure and automated access to Snowflake. With an intuitive Workbench interface, users can configure and manage authentication effortlessly, eliminating the need for manual credential handling and enhancing security.

Figure 1: OAuth 2.0 configuration in Workbench

Figure 2: Reuse connection configuration and monitor referencing integration flows

 

Intuitive Database Explorer for Effortless Query Management

The integration process becomes significantly smoother with Advantco’s Database Explorer, which provides a structured and user-friendly way to interact with Snowflake databases. Users can browse database structures, generate SQL queries, and automate schema creation, reducing manual effort and minimizing errors.

Figure 3: Database Explorer and Schema/Payload generator

 

Figure 4: SQL Query Builder

 

High-Performance Data Ingestion with Snowpipe Streaming API

Handling large-scale data ingestion efficiently is crucial for enterprises. Advantco’s Snowflake adapter leverages Snowpipe Streaming API, allowing businesses to stream data continuously without batch size limitations. This approach reduces latency, enhances performance, and optimizes cost by eliminating the need for constant compute warehouse usage.

Figure 5: Example of batch streaming from Advantco Kafka adapter to Snowflake adapter

 

Optimized Query Processing with Sender-Side Execution

Efficient data retrieval is essential for smooth operations. Advantco’s Snowflake adapter enables sender-side query execution, allowing for scheduled polling, pagination, and optimized record processing. This ensures that even large datasets execute smoothly without causing integration delays.

Figure 6: Query configuration

Figure 7: Scheduler and Pagination

 

Real-Time Change Data Capture (CDC) for Data Synchronization

Keeping data synchronized between SAP and Snowflake is simplified with real-time Change Data Capture (CDC). Advantco’s Snowflake adapter tracks inserts, updates, and deletions efficiently, ensuring that businesses maintain up-to-date data across their systems without performance degradation.

Figure 8: CDC configuration

 

Conclusion: The enhanced Advantco Snowflake adapter for SAP Integration Suite provides:

  • Secure OAuth 2.0 Authentication – Reduces the need for credential management.
  • Database Explorer – Automates query generation and schema management.
  • High-Performance Streaming – Supports real-time data ingestion with Snowpipe.
  • Optimized Query Execution – Handles large datasets efficiently.
  • Real-Time CDC Support – Synchronizes SAP and Snowflake environments.

entry.title: Re: FIori: Adaptive Mode how to
entry.content: read more from that link

entry.title: SAP SARA WRITE to file. What file type is the file? Ascii, binary?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working on archiving/deleting old IDOCS.  I'm using tcode SARA to test this.  When setting up the logical file, what should be the data type?

Is there a way to view the file to see what's in it?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Update invoice status using API
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I have to create invoices using API calls to SAP. 

There are 2 type of invoices:

  • Invoices with PO reference
  • Invoices with a GL / CC reference

For the invoices with a GL / CC reference, how can I POST them in SAP with a specific status (BLOCKED), then an approbation is made in an external system to approve that specific invoice. Is that a specific endpoint, or do I have to make a new POST call with a new 'SupplierInvoiceStatus' value?

For the invoice with PO references, we are currently using MRBR. 

I will POST the invoice with an API call, it will be block by MRBR (unit price difference...), how can I release that invoice if the approbation is made in an other system? Is there a specific endpoint to approve a blocked invoiced from MRBR, or do I have to update the invoice status and make a new POST with a different value of 'SupplierInvoiceStatus'?

Thanks for your help

entry.title: refresh cco sales screen from a button
entry.content:
Hey customer checkout plugin development experts, 
 
I'm trying to refresh the UI (sales screen) after updating the receipt with some discounts. 
 
I see the changes on the receipt, but can't seem to figure out how to refresh the screen.
 
Here's my popup message with the redeem button code:
 
// Handle when user clicks "Redeem Tickets"
if (StringUtils.equals("redeemTicket", requestId)) {
String materialId = body.getString("materialId");
 
if (currentReceipt != null) {
System.out.println("🎟️ Redeem Ticket Button Clicked");
 
if (currentReceipt == null) {
System.out.println("⚠️ No active receipt object! Fetching latest...");
}
 
if (currentReceipt == null) {
System.out.println("❌ No active receipt found!");
return;
}
ApplyTicket(currentReceipt);
}
 
Here's my ApplyTicket code:
 
public void ApplyTicket(ReceiptEntity crrentReceipt) {
System.out.print("Entered Button Apply Ticket");
 
String receiptKey = currentReceipt.getKey();
 
ReceiptEntity receipt = receiptManager.retrieveEntityByKey(receiptKey);
 
List<SalesItemEntity> salesItems = receipt.getSalesItems();
for (SalesItemEntity salesItem: salesItems) {
 
salesItem.setDiscountNetAmount(BigDecimal.valueOf(4.00));
 
salesItem.setDiscountManuallyChanged(true);
salesItem.setMarkChanged(true);
salesItem.setItemDiscountChanged(true);
}
// receiptManager.update(receipt);
calculationPosService.calculate(receipt, EntityActions.CHECK_CONS);
UIEventDispatcher.INSTANCE.dispatchAction(CConst.UIEventsIds.RECEIPT_REFRESH, null, receipt);
 
for (SalesItemEntity salesItem: salesItems) {
 
System.out.println("Receipt Changes ItemCode: " + salesItem.getId() + " Discount Amount: " + salesItem.getDiscountNetAmount());
}
}
 
and this is my onSalesItemAddedtoReceipt and onSalesItemUpdated methods where I'm setting the global currentReceipt = receipt
 
public  void onSalesItemAddedToReceipt(com.sap.scco.ap.pos.dao.CDBSession dbSession, com.sap.scco.ap.pos.entity.ReceiptEntity receipt, java.util.List<com.sap.scco.ap.pos.entity.SalesItemEntity> salesItems, java.math.BigDecimal quantity) {
 
currentReceipt = receipt;
}
 
 
//this event here when you updating item price, qty etc...
 public void onSalesItemUpdated(com.sap.scco.ap.pos.dao.CDBSession dbSession, com.sap.scco.ap.pos.entity.ReceiptEntity receipt, com.sap.scco.ap.pos.entity.SalesItemEntity newSalesItem, java.math.BigDecimal quantity) {
 
System.out.println("Entered Default onsalesItemUpdated");
currentReceipt = receipt;
}
 
As you can see, at the end of ApplyTicket method, I'm logging the receipt changes and they are correct, but I can't see to figure out how to update the Sales UI.
 
I would really appreciate your help to resolve this as soon as possible.
 
Thanks

entry.title: Re: Negative Balance Restriction based on future accruals.
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this. I am going to bookmark this for next time I have this request.

entry.title: Re: RSDDB_LOGINDEX_CREATE for BW Bridge
entry.content:
Thank you, Martin. That is an interesting idea, but as you guessed, the step does not exist anymore in the process chains.

The sales pitch for BW bridge is that you can leverage past developments from BW to transition to Datasphere, but it is so extremely closed off, that it is almost unusable.

entry.title: Re: PU19 Error in Generating PDF
entry.content: Ask a developer to debug to obtain more from the ADS exceptions. You may also use ADS trace.

entry.title: Re: Smartforms-Second page not displayed
entry.content: Exactly, I'm having this problem too after migrating to S4. And he didn't even have the good will to post how he solved it. Did you manage to find out?

entry.title: SAP C4C - Calendar questions
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm using SAP C4C and would like to start using the calendar feature.

We want to use it as a scheduling tool for our receptionist.

We have space for up to five different appointments at the same time, and we’d like to set a limit to ensure no more than five are scheduled simultaneously. Is it possible to configure this limitation?

Another option we might consider is using a shared user account for scheduling appointments. This would allow us to register infos about clients while also reserving a spot in the meeting room. In this case, can we still enforce a limit on the number of appointments at the same time?

Is there any other standard way to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Extensibility Adobe Forms
entry.content:
Dear All

We have 5 company codes and want to assign a separate company logo and footer address to standard invoice form of sales module within Public Cloud.

Is it possible to manage, all the logo and addresses dynamically within standard form using manage logo / text apps or we have to create 5 custom master forms to have hardcoded logo and addresses for each company code.

entry.title: Re: Is SAP BTP FOCUS standard compliant?
entry.content:
I checked with our BTP CSM this morning and there is no native FOCUS support in BTP.

Hopefully it will be added at some point in the future.

entry.title: Screen Personas Update Server restart
entry.content:
We ar confronted by our customer that screen personas need frequent updates if Google Chrome is updated. And any personas upgrade will result in a server reboot.

Can anybody confirm this?

We want to use screen personas on mobile scanners in the warehouse running the Android operating system e.g. Zebra or Honeywell or Keyence.

We only found hints that the cache needs to be cleared on the server and the device.

BR, Peter
